title: Daily Brief — May 24, 2026
content:

May 12  ███████████████████░░░░░░  49  Neutral

- Bitcoin ETFs saw **$1.04B net outflow** during May 11–15, snapping 6 weeks of inflows *(CoinMarketCap)*
- Strategy added **535 BTC** in May for ~$43M — total holdings: **818,869 BTC** *(TimothySykes)*
- Retail sitting out — Bloomberg: "Wall of Worry" keeping individual investors on sidelines *(Bloomberg)*
- 30% of U.S. adults (70.4M) now own crypto, up from 27% in 2024 *(Security.org)*
- Analyst range: BTC likely trading **$75,871–$78,961** for the year *(CoinCodex)*

---

## 🤖 Tech & AI

- **Anthropic "Code with Claude"** event in London: ~50% of attending devs have shipped PRs fully written by Claude. Anthropic now reportedly valued at **$900B**, outpacing OpenAI in enterprise market share *(MIT Technology Review)*
- **Claude Mythos** (nation-state-level cyber capabilities, unreleased to public): Anthropic launched **Project Glasswing**, giving AWS, Apple, Cisco, Google, JPMorgan & Microsoft access to patch critical vulnerabilities *(TechCrunch)*
- **OpenAI** launched in-ChatGPT ad platform (targeting $2.5B revenue this year) and three new real-time audio models: GPT-Realtime-2, GPT-Realtime-Translate (70+ languages), GPT-Realtime-Whisper *(OpenAI)*
- **Meta** unveiled **Muse Spark**, its first flagship LLM from new Superintelligence Labs; committed **$115–135B** in AI capex for 2026 — nearly double last year *(tech press)*
- **OpenAI reasoning model** outperformed experienced physicians in ER patient diagnosis using electronic health records — Boston emergency department trial *(MarketingProfs)*

---

## 🔬 Health & Science

- **Leucine & energy:** Researchers found leucine (in protein-rich foods) supercharges mitochondria by protecting energy-producing proteins inside cells *(ScienceDaily)*
- **MIT gut repair:** Cysteine — found in meat, dairy, beans & nuts — identified as a potent trigger for intestinal repair *(SciTechDaily)*
- **Aging cells:** New theory overturns assumptions — some senescent cells may actually protect the body; many age-related diseases may begin decades before symptoms *(ScienceDaily)*
- **Women & dementia:** UC San Diego study of 17,000+ adults finds women may be especially sensitive to common dementia risk factors *(ScienceDaily)*
- **Nasal vaccine breakthrough:** A single nasal shot shown to protect against a broad range of respiratory illnesses including Covid and flu *(SciTechDaily)*

---

| Index | Level | Weekly |
|-------|-------|--------|
| 🇺🇸 S&P 500 | ~5,700 | ✅ +0.4% — **8th consecutive weekly gain** |
| 📊 Nasdaq | — | ✅ +0.2% — 7th gain in 8 weeks |
| 📈 Dow Jones | ~50,580 | ✅ +294 pts (+0.58%) Friday |

- **Earnings season exceptional:** 90%+ of S&P 500 firms reported; average earnings growth **+28%**, well above estimates *(FactSet / Charles Schwab)*
- **New Fed Chair:** Kevin Warsh expected to be sworn in as Federal Reserve Chairman *(TheStreet)*
- **Bond stress:** 30-year Treasury yield hit a nearly **19-year high** earlier this week amid Middle East-driven inflation concerns *(TheStreet)*
- **Peace talks:** Positive signals from Middle East negotiations helped drive Friday's rally *(TheStreet)*
- **Markets closed Monday**, May 25 — U.S. Memorial Day. Resumes Tuesday, May 26.

---

*📅 Generated May 24, 2026 · Sources: Yahoo Finance, MarketBeat, Bloomberg, TechCrunch, MIT Technology Review, ScienceDaily, Charles Schwab, TheStreet, CoinMarketCap, Security.org, CoinCodex*
